lane_stats.seasonality_notes: Peak volumes Aug-Oct (produce season). Rate pressure Dec-Jan.

faq_seeds.q: How long does LTL freight take from Los Angeles to Phoenix?
faq_seeds.a: Estimated transit is 2-3 business days on this ~421-mile lane. Actual times depend on carrier routing and weather.

faq_seeds.q: How much does LTL shipping from Los Angeles to Phoenix cost?
faq_seeds.a: Modeled LTL rates range from $1,147 to $1,529 depending on freight details. Get an instant quote for real-time pricing.

faq_seeds.q: What equipment is available on the Los Angeles to Phoenix lane?
faq_seeds.a: Common equipment includes Dry Van, Reefer (temp-controlled). Availability varies by season and demand.

faq_seeds.q: Can we start with just this lane before expanding?
faq_seeds.a: Yes. A single-lane pilot lets you validate performance before committing to additional corridors.

faq_seeds.q: How does WARP handle exceptions on this LTL lane?
faq_seeds.a: WARP detects exceptions automatically with alerts within 30 minutes of any status change.
